slice: DNS wire-decoder lab validation — adapter coverage (lab-backed compatibility)
lane: operator-directed — 'build the zoo' (YAGNI gates live authority, not adapter coverage)
doctrine: Adapter coverage validated against synthetic lab substrate before live use. Synthetic compatibility != live testimony.
finding: DNS V0 (dns_state) was already largely shipped: ResponseKind taxonomy, evaluator (nq-db/dns.rs), DB table, UdpDnsClient, `nq-monitor probe dns` CLI. The RISKY uncovered part was the hand-rolled UDP wire decoder probe.rs::parse_response — previously only unit-tested via SYNTHETIC WireOutcomes through outcome_from_wire; it had never met a real resolver.
method: Spun up REAL BIND 9.18.49 in docker (debian bookworm; authoritative zone lab.test, recursion off), captured raw DNS response datagrams for each RCODE-distinguished kind by querying with a python UDP client INSIDE the container (docker filesystem sharing — mounts AND build context — is broken in this rootless/namespaced daemon; only stdin + container network work, so config+capture done in-container). Container --rm; no residue.

captured_real_bytes.nodata_aaaa: RCODE 0, 0 answers, SOA in authority -> Negative{Nodata} (the load-bearing success-vs-nodata split)

built: crates/nq-monitor/tests/fixtures/dns/{success_a,nodata_aaaa,nxdomain_a,refused_a}.hex (real BIND bytes) + README (provenance + compatibility-not-live labeling + reproduce).
5 tests in probe::tests feeding the real bytes to parse_response: success decodes A+ttl; nodata is NOT success; nxdomain; refused; id-mismatch on real bytes -> TransportError.

verify.dns_byte_tests: 5/5 pass — hand-rolled decoder correct against real BIND datagrams (no bug surfaced; now KNOWN-correct vs real wire, not just synthetic)

labeling_is_the_guard: Fixtures + README marked lab-backed COMPATIBILITY evidence: 'the decoder correctly classifies real resolver responses under declared lab conditions', never live testimony about any network's DNS state.
scope_guard: Did NOT change probe semantics / ResponseKind taxonomy / evaluator / CLI; did NOT add TCP fallback / EDNS / DNSSEC (V0-out-of-scope); did NOT claim live DNS estate testimony. Validation + fixtures only.
deferred_named: servfail (RCODE 2 — shares negative decode path with refused) real capture; DNSSEC validation_failure (future validating probe); TCP-fallback/EDNS; broader DNS_WITNESS_FAMILY V0 expansion (still proposed).
acceptance: DNS wire decoder lab-validated against real resolver bytes; fixtures committed + labeled compatibility-not-live; existing probe unchanged. FEATURE_HISTORY § DNS_WIRE_DECODER_LAB_VALIDATION; DNS gap doc lab-validation note. Loop returns to AUDIT/idle. NOT PUSHED (workweek no-push); committed locally.
